character.core_question: What does this requirement mean — and what would good records look like?

voice.pace: clear, confident, no filler — explainer-ad register
voice.signature_beat: What does this requirement mean — and what would good records look like?
voice.prompt_suffix: Rich Southern coastal timbre; can sharpen to boardroom steel; clear confident presenter voice.

continuity_lock_verbatim: CONTINUITY LOCK @Serena-001: identical presenter face, professional wardrobe, studio interior set, same eye-line to camera — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut.

episode_reuse.host_shots: Lead every prompt with 30-year-old Serena Blake; professional wardrobe; studio interior cyclorama
episode_reuse.compliance_labels: PUBLIC SOURCE / PROCESS DIAGRAM / NOT LEGAL ADVICE on regulatory-touch beats
